page_metadata.biotools__summary: Novel succinylation site online prediction tool which is constructed to predict the lysine succinylation sites based on two major categories of characteristics: sequence-derived features and evolutionary-derived information of sequence and via an enhanced feature strategy for further optimizations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Novel succinylation site online prediction tool which is constructed to predict the lysine succinylation sites based on two major categories of characteristics: sequence-derived features and evolutionary-derived information of sequence and via an enhanced feature strategy for further optimizations.
